---
title: "itm_cellchat_3groups-merged"
author: "Xinyu Bai"
date: "2025-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(CellChat)
library(ggalluvial)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggalluvial)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(igraph)
library(Seurat)
library(svglite)
```

```{r}
# Load CellChat objects
cellchat_pre_response <- readRDS("cellchat/cellchat_pre_response_grouped_minor_exp_CODEXmarkers.rds")
cellchat_pre_resistant <- readRDS("cellchat/cellchat_pre_resistant_grouped_minor_exp_CODEXmarkers.rds")
cellchat_prog_resistant <- readRDS("cellchat/cellchat_prog_resistant_grouped_minor_exp_CODEXmarkers.rds")

# Merge
object.list <- list(
  Pre_Response = cellchat_pre_response,
  Pre_Resistant = cellchat_pre_resistant,
  Prog_Resistant = cellchat_prog_resistant
)

cellchat_all <- mergeCellChat(object.list, add.names = names(object.list), cell.prefix = TRUE)

# Save
save(object.list, file = "ITM_3group_cellchat_object.list.RData")
saveRDS(cellchat_all, file = "itm_3group_cellchat.rds")
```

```{r}
# Clear the workspace
rm(list = ls())

cellchat_all <- readRDS("itm_3group_cellchat.rds")
load("ITM_3group_cellchat_object.list.RData")
```

```{r}
gg1 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_all, show.legend = FALSE, group = c("Pre_Response", "Pre_Resistant", "Prog_Resistant"))

gg2 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_all, show.legend = FALSE, group = c("Pre_Response", "Pre_Resistant", "Prog_Resistant"), measure = "weight")

gg1 + gg2
```

```{r}
# Function to compare interactions and export pathway tables
compare_cellchat_pairs <- function(cellchat_obj, g1, g2, plot_dir, table_dir) {
  comparison_label <- paste0(g1, "_vs_", g2)
  message("Processing: ", comparison_label)

  # Plot differential interaction network
  png_filename <- paste0(plot_dir, "netVisual_diffInteraction_", comparison_label, ".png")
  png(png_filename, width = 32, height = 16, units = "cm", res = 300)
  netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat_obj, weight.scale = TRUE, comparison = c(g1, g2))
  dev.off()

  # Extract probability arrays
  netP_g1 <- cellchat_obj@netP[[g1]]$prob
  netP_g2 <- cellchat_obj@netP[[g2]]$prob

  # Skip if missing
  if (is.null(netP_g1) || is.null(netP_g2)) {
    warning("Missing pathway data for comparison: ", comparison_label)
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Compute average signaling probability per pathway (collapsed)
  avg_pathway_g1 <- sapply(1:dim(netP_g1)[3], function(i) {
    mean(netP_g1[, , i], na.rm = TRUE)
  })
  avg_pathway_g2 <- sapply(1:dim(netP_g2)[3], function(i) {
    mean(netP_g2[, , i], na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  names(avg_pathway_g1) <- dimnames(netP_g1)[[3]]
  names(avg_pathway_g2) <- dimnames(netP_g2)[[3]]

  # Align to common pathways
  common_pathways <- intersect(names(avg_pathway_g1), names(avg_pathway_g2))
  if (length(common_pathways) == 0) {
    warning("No common pathways found for: ", comparison_label)
    return(NULL)
  }

  avg_pathway_g1 <- avg_pathway_g1[common_pathways]
  avg_pathway_g2 <- avg_pathway_g2[common_pathways]
  pathway_fc <- avg_pathway_g2 - avg_pathway_g1

  # Create dataframe
  pathway_df <- data.frame(
    Pathway = common_pathways,
    Mean_Activity_g1 = avg_pathway_g1,
    Mean_Activity_g2 = avg_pathway_g2,
    Delta = pathway_fc
  )

  pathway_df <- pathway_df[order(-abs(pathway_df$Delta)), ]

  # Save CSV
  csv_filename <- paste0(table_dir, "pathway_delta_", comparison_label, ".csv")
  write.csv(pathway_df, file = csv_filename, row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Main script
group_names <- c("Pre_Response", "Pre_Resistant", "Prog_Resistant")
plot_dir <- "plots/cath_obj_v3/cellchat_diff_interaction_networks/"
table_dir <- "results/cath_obj_v3/cellchat_diff_pathways_tables/"

dir.create(plot_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(table_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Run all pairwise comparisons
pairwise_comparisons <- combn(group_names, 2, simplify = FALSE)
for (pair in pairwise_comparisons) {
  compare_cellchat_pairs(cellchat_all, pair[1], pair[2], plot_dir, table_dir)
}
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# Set your directory path to the saved CSVs
table_dir <- "results/cath_obj_v3/cellchat_diff_pathways_tables/"

# List of comparison files
files <- list.files(table_dir, pattern = "pathway_delta_.*\\.csv", full.names = TRUE)

# Loop through each file and create a bar plot
for (file in files) {
  # Extract comparison label from filename
  comparison_label <- gsub("pathway_delta_|\\.csv", "", basename(file))

  # Load the CSV
  df <- read_csv(file)

  # Select top N pathways by absolute delta
  top_n <- 10
  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(Delta))) %>%
    head(top_n)

  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = reorder(Pathway, Delta), y = Delta, fill = Delta > 0)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = paste("Top Pathway Delta:", comparison_label),
         x = "Pathway", y = "Δ Mean Signaling Activity (g2 - g1)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2ca02c", "FALSE" = "#d62728"))

  # Save plot
  ggsave(paste0("plots/cath_obj_v3/delta_barplot_", comparison_label, ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

# Define directory containing CSVs
csv_dir <- "results/cath_obj_v3/cellchat_diff_pathways_tables/"  # update if needed

# List all delta CSV files
delta_files <- list.files(csv_dir, pattern = "^pathway_delta_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Read and combine all CSVs into a single dataframe
delta_list <- lapply(delta_files, function(file) {
  df <- read.csv(file)
  comparison <- gsub("pathway_delta_|\\.csv", "", basename(file))
  df$Comparison <- comparison
  return(df[, c("Pathway", "Delta", "Comparison")])
})

# Combine into one dataframe
delta_all <- bind_rows(delta_list)

# Pivot to wide format for heatmap
delta_mat <- delta_all %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparison, values_from = Delta, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Pathway") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Optionally filter top pathways by max delta
top_n <- 20
top_pathways <- names(sort(apply(abs(delta_mat), 1, max), decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]
delta_mat_subset <- delta_mat[top_pathways, ]

# Plot heatmap
Heatmap(delta_mat_subset,
        name = "Δ Signaling",
        col = colorRamp2(c(min(delta_mat_subset), 0, max(delta_mat_subset)),
                         c("blue", "white", "red")),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        show_row_names = TRUE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Δ Activity"))

```



```{r}
activity_clean <- read.csv("results/cath_obj_v3/cellchat_diff_pathways_tables/mean_pathway_activity_all_groups.csv", row.names = 1)

# Select top 30 pathways by average activity
top_n <- 30
top_pathways <- rowMeans(activity_clean, na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  sort(decreasing = TRUE) %>%
  head(top_n) %>%
  names()

activity_subset <- activity_clean[top_pathways, ]

# Plot heatmap
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(viridis)

# Use colorRamp2 with two breaks and two colors
color_fun <- colorRamp2(
  range(activity_subset, na.rm = TRUE),
  c("white", "red")
)

# Plot heatmap
Heatmap(as.matrix(activity_subset),
        name = "Mean Activity",
        col = color_fun,
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Mean Activity"))
```
